overview.short: Kaila Devi Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Kailadevi village of Karauli district, in the Indian state of Rajasthan.

topPlaces.name: Kailadevi
topPlaces.description: Kailadevi is a village in Karauli Tehsil, in the Karauli District of the Indian state of Rajasthan. It falls under the Bharatpur Division.

topPlaces.name: Kailadevi Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Kailadevi Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected wildlife area in Karauli district of Rajasthan, India. It was notified in 1983 and covers approximately 676.38 km² area.

items.note: Kailadevi is a village in Karauli Tehsil, in the Karauli District of the Indian state of Rajasthan. It falls under the Bharatpur Division.
Kailadevi Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected wildlife area in Karauli district of Rajasthan, India. It was notified in 1983 and covers approximately 676.38 km² area.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kaila devi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kaila devi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kaila devi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (121 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (128 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kaila devi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kaila devi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kaila devi?
faq.a: Stays in Kaila devi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kaila devi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kailadevi, Kailadevi Wildlife Sanctuary.
